an7.51:1.1: “Monks, I will teach you a Dhamma discourse on bondage & lack of bondage.
an7.51:2.1: “A woman attends inwardly to her feminine faculties,
an7.51:2.2: her feminine gestures, her feminine manners, feminine poise, feminine desires, feminine voice, feminine charms.
an7.51:2.3: She is excited by that, delighted by that.
an7.51:2.4: Being excited & delighted by that, she attends outwardly to masculine faculties,
an7.51:2.5: masculine gestures, masculine manners, masculine poise, masculine desires, masculine voices, masculine charms.
an7.51:2.6: She is excited by that, delighted by that.
an7.51:2.7: Being excited & delighted by that, she wants to be bonded to what is outside her,
an7.51:2.8: wants whatever pleasure & happiness that arise based on that bond.
an7.51:2.9: Delighting, caught up in her femininity, a woman goes into bondage with reference to men.
an7.51:2.10: This is how a woman does not transcend her femininity.
an7.51:3.1: “A man attends inwardly to his masculine faculties,
an7.51:3.2: masculine gestures, masculine manners, masculine poise, masculine desires, masculine voice, masculine charms.
an7.51:3.3: He is excited by that, delighted by that.
an7.51:3.4: Being excited & delighted by that, he attends outwardly to feminine faculties,
an7.51:3.5: feminine gestures, feminine manners, feminine poise, feminine desires, feminine voices, feminine charms.
an7.51:3.6: He is excited by that, delighted by that.
an7.51:3.7: Being excited & delighted by that, he wants to be bonded to what is outside him,
an7.51:3.8: wants whatever pleasure & happiness that arise based on that bond.
an7.51:3.9: Delighting, caught up in his masculinity, a man goes into bondage with reference to women.
an7.51:3.10: This is how a man does not transcend his masculinity.
an7.51:4.1: “And how is there lack of bondage?
an7.51:4.2: A woman does not attend inwardly to her feminine faculties…
an7.51:4.4: She is not excited by that, not delighted by that…
an7.51:4.5: does not attend outwardly to masculine faculties…
an7.51:4.7: She is not excited by that, not delighted by that…
an7.51:4.8: does not want to be bonded to what is outside her,
an7.51:4.9: does not want whatever pleasure & happiness that arise based on that bond.
an7.51:4.10: Not delighting, not caught up in her femininity, a woman does not go into bondage with reference to men.
an7.51:4.11: This is how a woman transcends her femininity.
an7.51:5.1: “A man does not attend inwardly to his masculine faculties…
an7.51:5.3: He is not excited by that, not delighted by that…
an7.51:5.4: does not attend outwardly to feminine faculties…
an7.51:5.6: He is not excited by that, not delighted by that…
an7.51:5.7: does not want to be bonded to what is outside him,
an7.51:5.8: does not want whatever pleasure & happiness that arise based on that bond.
an7.51:5.9: Not delighting, not caught up in his masculinity, a man does not go into bondage with reference to women.
an7.51:5.10: This is how a man transcends his masculinity.
an7.51:5.11: “This is how there is lack of bondage.
an7.51:5.12: And this is the Dhamma discourse on bondage & lack of bondage.”
